name: eh-system1
description: EH-SYSTEM1 — root for the shared integrations/ provider layer (Postgres/Gemini/Meta). The admin-app and scripts/ each have their own package.json; this one declares the dependencies that the framework-agnostic integrations/ modules import so type resolution works from every consumer.

scripts.db:codegen: kysely-codegen --dialect postgres --exclude-pattern 'auth.*' --numeric-parser number --out-file integrations/db/types.ts && sed -i '' -e 's|export type Int8 = ColumnType<string,|export type Int8 = ColumnType<number,|' -e 's|export type Timestamp = ColumnType<Date,|export type Timestamp = ColumnType<string,|' integrations/db/types.ts
